title: Scan with a servo-mounted sensor
description: Sweep an ultrasonic sensor on a servo to map nearby obstacles and create a simple scan.

dialogue.text: Ready to give your bot awareness? We'll sweep an ultrasonic sensor on a servo like radar and log the readings.
Mount the ultrasonic sensor to the servo horn and wire the servo to pin 9 and power. Secure the cables so they don't snag during the sweep.
Use Servo and NewPing to sweep and log distances, forming a simple radar map. Record the angles alongside the distances so you can plot them later.
